_publications._publicationTitle: A platform for rapid patient-derived cutaneous neurofibroma organoid establishment and screening

basicInfo.description: Patient-derived cNF organoid from 39-year-old female NF1 patient; established from arms/trunk cNF by collagenase IV dissociation and reconstitution in Mammocult:Matrigel (3:4) ring format; large NF1 deletion (~1.4 Mb) plus compound structural variants identified by WGS
basicInfo.clinicalData: Age at surgery: 39; Sex: Female; cNF location: arms, trunk; Single tumors: 1; Pooled tumors: 3; NF1 germline variants: large deletion chr17:30,650,364-32,066,470 (1,416,106 bp); large inversion chr17:2,514,734-40,523,190; splicing variant G>T (pos 31,330,295)
validationMethods: IHC (S100, CD34, CD56, CD117/c-Kit, NGFR, SOX2, SOX10, PanCytokeratin)
basicInfo.developerAffiliation: Department of Orthopaedic Surgery, David Geffen School of Medicine, UCLA
